subcodes.first_line: The chains of Joseph's prison become as a mount of bounty; in truth, in Egypt he becometh beloved and in every land a sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: زنجیر سجن یوسفی چون گردنه احسان اولور مصر حقیقتده عزیز هر کشوره سلطان اولور
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
